; example.com zone export, generated 2026-04-15
example.com.        3600    IN      NS      ns1.example.com.
example.com.        3600    IN      NS      ns2.example.com.
example.com.        3600    IN      MX      10 mail1.example.com.
example.com.        3600    IN      MX      20 mail2.example.com.
example.com.        3600    IN      TXT     "v=spf1 ip4:93.184.216.0/24 -all"
example.com.        3600    IN      TXT     "google-site-verification=abc123"
example.com.        300     IN      A       93.184.216.34
app.example.com.    300     IN      A       93.184.216.40
app.example.com.    300     IN      AAAA    2606:2800:220:1::1234
api.example.com.    300     IN      A       93.184.216.41
www.example.com.    300     IN      CNAME   app.example.com.
status.example.com. 300     IN      CNAME   status.statuspage.io.
